completed_tasks.name: Plan Phase 6 — 3 plans / 3 waves created and validated

remaining_tasks.name: Execute 06-01 (Wave 1) — cross-space selector core in Hud.cs + retire Tab + remove 2D circle
Execute 06-02 (Wave 2) — TargetSelectorPanel UI + Main.tscn wiring + play-test
Execute 06-03 (Wave 3) — 3D sphere-outline marker + target_outline.gdshader + tracking label + play-test

human_actions_pending.action: Play-test checkpoint in 06-02 (selector panel) and 06-03 (3D marker incl. no-mesh galaxy case)
human_actions_pending.context: Both Wave 2 and Wave 3 plans are autonomous:false with blocking human-verify checkpoints — they require running the Godot editor (F5) and confirming behavior

decisions.rationale: Tight Hud.cs coupling + shared Main.tscn force sequential waves: 06-02 consumes the 06-01 selector API; 06-03 shares Main.tscn with 06-02 and reads cross-space ActiveTargetIndex from 06-01

decisions.decision: Active-target ownership stays in Hud (_targetIndex), panel writes via new public SetTargetIndex(int)
decisions.rationale: Preserves the FlightController.ActiveTargetIndex D-43 ease-out contract while keeping Hud read-only of SIM state (D-53); _targetIndex is internal HUD ownership, not sim state

decisions.decision: Tab repurposed from cycle_target to toggle_target_panel; panel = cursor owner (open=Visible, close=Captured)
decisions.rationale: D-56 retires the Tab cycle; reconciles with the 01-03 FlightController T-key Confined/Captured mouse mode (different action keys: Tab vs T)

decisions.decision: Marker = unit SphereMesh + unlit rim/fresnel outline shader (single-pass discard interior)
decisions.rationale: PATTERNS.md recommendation; Claude's-discretion per D-50; projection-matched silhouette that distorts like the body

decisions.decision: Marker placement/size purely from UniObject via UniMath LCA + observer-unit math (metres / ship.LocalPos.Scale * factor), NO render-set gate
decisions.rationale: D-51 key decision — removes the old D-46 GetRenderPosition gate so a cross-space target incl. a no-mesh galaxy in Universe space still gets a correctly-placed marker

uncommitted_files: .planning/phases/06-targeting-system/06-PATTERNS.md (untracked — planning input artifact from context gathering)
